4.competency_question: What is the name of the event when the policy becomes incontestable after two years?
What is the duration of the incontestability period?
What is the condition for the policy to become incontestable?
4.expected_answer: after it has been in force during the lifetime of the Insured

4.competency_question: What is the event that triggers the suicide exclusion?
What is the duration of the suicide exclusion period?
4.expected_answer: two years from the Effective Date

4.competency_question: What is the company's liability during the suicide exclusion period?
4.expected_answer: limited to a refund of premiums paid, without interest, less any indebtedness

4.competency_question: What is the event that triggers the misstatement of age or gender provision?
4.expected_answer: the age or gender of the Insured has been misstated

4.competency_question: What is the adjustment rule for the amount of insurance due to misstatement of age or gender?
4.expected_answer: the amount of insurance shall be adjusted to the amount that the premium paid would have purchased at the correct age or gender

4.competency_question: What is the duration of the grace period for premium payment?
What is the condition for the grace period to be granted?
What is the state of the policy during the grace period?
What is the event that triggers the lapse of the policy?
4.expected_answer: a premium is not paid before the end of the grace period

4.competency_question: What is the effective date of the lapse?
4.expected_answer: as of the due date of the unpaid premium

4.competency_question: What is the state of the policy after lapse?
4.expected_answer: coverage shall terminate with no further benefits payable

5.competency_question: What is the duration of the reinstatement period for a lapsed policy?
What is the required evidence for reinstating a lapsed policy?
5.expected_answer: evidence of insurability satisfactory to the Company

5.competency_question: What must be paid to reinstate a lapsed policy?
5.expected_answer: all past due premiums with interest

5.competency_question: What determines the interest amount for reinstating a lapsed policy?
5.expected_answer: the Company at the time of reinstatement

5.competency_question: What is the due date for the first premium payment?
5.expected_answer: the Effective Date of the policy

5.competency_question: What payment modes are available for premiums?
Who must approve a change in premium payment mode?
What triggers the lapse of a policy due to non-payment of premium?
5.expected_answer: Failure to pay the premium by the end of the grace period

5.competency_question: What happens to coverage if a policy lapses due to non-payment?
5.expected_answer: coverage will terminate without value except as provided under the Reinstatement provision

5.competency_question: Does this policy include an Automatic Premium Loan provision by default?
5.expected_answer: This policy does not include an Automatic Premium Loan provision unless endorsed or added by rider

5.competency_question: Under what condition will an Automatic Premium Loan pay unpaid premiums at the end of the grace period?
5.expected_answer: provided there is sufficient loan value available

6.competency_question: What is the name of the event when the Death Benefit is paid to the Policy Owner or estate?

6.expected_answer: the Policy Owner, if living, or to the Owner’s estate

6.competency_question: What is the name of the event when interest accrues on the Death Benefit?

6.expected_answer: from the date of death until the date of payment

6.competency_question: What is the name of the event when the Beneficiary is designated?
Who is the agent participant in a 'Beneficiary Designation' event?

7.expected_answer: the date the request is signed

7.competency_question: What is the condition regarding the Insured's living status for a 'Change of Beneficiary' event to take effect?

7.competency_question: What is the name of the event when a policy's coverage is terminated by the Policy Owner?

7.expected_answer: insurance coverage will terminate and no further benefits will be payable

7.competency_question: What happens to unearned premiums upon a 'Cancellation' event?
7.expected_answer: they will be refunded as specified under applicable law

7.competency_question: What is the name of the event when a policy is transferred to another party by the Policy Owner?

7.expected_answer: written assignment acceptable to the Company

7.competency_question: What is the Company's responsibility regarding the validity of an 'Assignment' event?
7.expected_answer: The Company shall not be responsible for the validity or tax consequences of any assignment

7.competency_question: What is the condition regarding the rights of the Owner and Beneficiary after an 'Assignment' event?
7.expected_answer: the rights of the Owner and Beneficiary will be subject to the terms of the assignment
